body_preview:
[Miso Welcomes Scooter’s Coffee. Click here to invest now.](https://invest.misorobotics.com/)

Hi Benjamin Barber,
 
We’re thrilled to offer a huge Miso welcome to the Scooter’s Coffee brand! A franchise group of Scooter’s Coffee operators just joined the growing Miso customer ecosystem.

Scooter’s is one of the fastest-growing drive-thru coffee brands in the country: high volume, an army of super-fans, and zero room for operational inefficiency. That’s why they now rely on Miso’s Zignyl restaurant operations product.

With Miso’s tech, Scooter’s operators can:

- Take immediate actions based on real-time store data

- Optimize labor scheduling and food throughput instantly

- Incentivize employees to hit daily sales goals to also drive net-new profits for restaurant operators
It’s happening now.

Each new customer strengthens the Miso network, expands our footprint, and increases the value of our entire platform, enabling the power of our Flippy Fry Station AI robot to stretch beyond the fryer. With Miso’s Zignyl, customers can now streamline their entire business operation.

We’re building the operating system for modern restaurants. And [you can join us as an investor](https://invest.misorobotics.com/) and secure up to 7% bonus shares.

[INVEST NOW](https://invest.misorobotics.com/checkout)

https://invest.misorobotics.com/

© 2026 - Miso Robotics® all rights reserved.

Miso Robotics is offering securities through the use of an Offering Statement that has been qualified by the Securities and Exchange Commission under Tier II of Regulation A. A copy of the Final Offering Circular that forms a part of the Offering Statement may be obtained from: https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1710670/000110465926001520/tm262179d1_partiiandiii.htm

subject: Welcoming Scooter’s Coffee into the Miso Customer Ecosystem
